/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/Graphics/Renderer/IBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/Graphics/Renderer/VAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/Graphics/Renderer/VBL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/Graphics/Renderer/VBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/Graphics/Renderer/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/Graphics/Renderer/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/Graphics/shaders/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/program.cpp.o CMakeFiles/penguin.dir/src/window/window.cpp.o -o penguin  -lglfw /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
